CustomField.formula: IF( ProjectInvoiceCurrency__c ="CHF", ProjectCostCenter__r.CHFIBAN__c , IF( ProjectInvoiceCurrency__c ="EUR", ProjectCostCenter__r.EURIBAN__c , IF( ProjectInvoiceCurrency__c ="USD", ProjectCostCenter__r.USDIBAN__c , IF( ProjectInvoiceCurrency__c ="SGD", ProjectCostCenter__r.SGDIBAN__c , IF( ProjectInvoiceCurrency__c ="GBP", ProjectCostCenter__r.GBPIBAN__c , "")))))
CustomField.label: IBAN
